assert_ViolatedEdges.condition: {e in Edges : \E v in violations : v.edge = e}

assert_CountConsistency.message:

        (checked_count = satisfied_count + Cardinality(ViolatedEdges))

assert_EmptyEdgesImpliesEmptyReport.condition:
